title: Librarian and Mending
quickAnswer: A librarian can offer Mending as an enchanted book trade. Place and break the lectern before the villager is locked in by trading until you get the book you want.
keyFacts: Only unemployed villagers can change profession when linked to a workstation.
After you trade once, the villager's profession and trade pool are locked.
Librarians use lecterns as their workstation.
commonMistakes: Trading too early and locking a bad trade set.
Trying to reroll a villager that already has experience from trading.
